name: CORE Iteration 1: 基础骨架与身份校验
goal: 完成底层单点登录链路对接并打多租户落盘加密数据通道
goal_en: Finish underlying SSO links and multi-tenant encrypted channels.

name: CORE Iteration 2: 智能卡片与协作视图开发
name_en: CORE Iteration 2: Smart Cards & Collaboration Views
goal: 研发流式对话大模型渲染引擎，交付看板、甘特多重视图交互
goal_en: Develop streaming LLM rendering engine, deliver Kanban & Gantt view interactions.

name: CORE Iteration 3: CI跑跑自动化安全核对上线
name_en: CORE Iteration 3: CI Testing & Security Checks
goal: 并入跑测自动化容错机制，完成高等级RBAC数据防越权加壳上线
goal_en: Merge test auto-retries and launch high-level RBAC data protection boundaries.

name: CD Iteration 1: 云原生交付拓扑流打通
name_en: CD Iteration 1: Cloud Native Delivery Topology
goal: 打通可视化拓扑节点的连线及编辑模块，接入高可用网关网控层
goal_en: Connect visual topology editor module, link with high-availability API gateway.

name: CD Iteration 2: 灰度发布策略管理面板
goal: 提供全面的蓝绿发布、金丝雀配置以及监控报警大盘。
goal_en: Provide comprehensive Blue/Green and Canary config panels, plus monitoring dashboards.

name: AGENT Iteration 1: RAG 向量语义召回和测试对接
name_en: AGENT Iteration 1: RAG Semantics & Test Hooks
goal: 完成向量图谱对接且交付精准问答召回能力，跑测通过智能提取技术指标
goal_en: Finish Vector Graph hooks, deliver accurate Q&A recall, pass auto-extraction tests.

name: AGENT Iteration 2: 意图识别及语音输入
name_en: AGENT Iteration 2: Intent Engine & Voice Input
goal: 调优Few-shot参数，上架语音识别Whisper插件
goal_en: Tune Few-shot parameters, publish Whisper voice recognition plugin.

name: CORE Iteration 4: 性能与安全加固
goal: 全量压测及三级等保安全核查
goal_en: Full load test and Level-3 security check

name: CORE Iteration 5: 商业化模块接入
goal: 打通计费大盘与企业权益
goal_en: Connect billing dashboard and enterprise rights

name: CD Iteration 3: AI与流水线结合探索
goal: 引入错误日志大模型分析并推荐解决方案
goal_en: Introduce LLM to analyze error logs and recommend solutions

name: CD Iteration 4: 架构解耦重构
goal: 拆分前端单体到微前端体系
goal_en: Split frontend monolith to micro-frontend architecture

name: AGENT Iteration 3: 多模态交互基础
goal: 研发图片与语音综合分析链路
goal_en: Develop image and voice combined analysis link

name: AGENT Iteration 4: IDE深度定制化
goal: 在Agent中融入底层运行沙箱终端
goal_en: Integrate raw runtime sandbox terminal into Agent
